narrative:
Oxford (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,045 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
